title: Abbey's Place Childcare Centre – Licence review process and recommendations for improvement - Ministry of Education
content:
Te tukanga arotake raihana me ngā tūtohu whakapai mō Abbey's Place Childcare Centre

## Abbey's Place Childcare Centre – Licence review process and recommendations for improvement
Review of ways to improve how our agencies identify and respond to suspected child abuse.
Following the death of Malachi Subecz, the Chief Executives of 6 agencies, including the Ministry of Education commissioned Dame Karen Poutasi to review ways to improve how our agencies identify and respond to suspected child abuse. Her report was published on 1 December 2022 and is available below.
In addition to Dame Karen Poutasi's report, the media statement and questions and answers are also available.
When the Ministry became aware of Malachi’s death, we undertook a review of the childcare centre he had attended, ultimately leading to the cancellation of the centre’s licence. We also initiated a review of our Ministry processes, and our report on this was provided to Dame Karen to help inform her review.
